"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, "__esModule", { value: true }); const sync_1 = require("../readers/sync"); const provider_1 = require("./provider"); class ProviderSync extends provider_1.default { constructor() { super(...arguments); this._reader = new sync_1.default(this._settings); } read(task) { const root = this._getRootDirectory(task); const options = this._getReaderOptions(task); const entries = this.api(root, task, options); return entries.map(options.transform); } api(root, task, options) { if (task.dynamic) { return this._reader.dynamic(root, options); } return this._reader.static(task.patterns, options); } } exports.default = ProviderSync;
